class.description: Direction-aware recovery behavior that strafes the holonomic base away from whatever the (arm-aware) footprint is wedged against, choosing the clear side from the filtered pointcloud (MoveIt backend) or the local costmap, until the footprint clears.
Recovery behavior that frees the footprint by retracting the UR10e arm (reducing reach and biasing the pan away from the obstacle) until the footprint clears, instead of moving the base.
